title: One Block Lucky Block
description: Chaotic and exciting Minecraft modpack that combines the classic One Block survival challenge with the unpredictable fun of Lucky Blocks.
body:
HOW TO PLAY:
Depends on Lucky Block ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lucky-block))

You start on a single floating block in the sky — with nothing else around you. Every time you mine the block, it regenerates into something new. Instead of normal progression, many of these blocks are Lucky Blocks, meaning anything can happen: you might receive powerful loot, rare resources, helpful mobs, or suddenly face dangerous enemies and explosive traps.

🎲 Random rewards and unexpected events

⚔️ Sudden combat challenges

💎 Overpowered loot and rare items

🌍 Skyblock-style survival and base building
